---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes on doctoral research, neology, academic life, conferences, funding, and more"
description-meta: "Posts about papers, events, news, and more"
body-classes: "top-level-page blog-page"
listing: 
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, reading-time, date]
  page-size: 100
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  contents: 
      - posts

page-layout: full
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.page-heading}
# Blog
The work, decisions, and context behind the CV
:::
